samples.text: All planets are object that orbits a stars. An idea is not a planet. Therefore, is an idea an object that orbits a star?
Every planet belongs to the category of object that orbits a stars. An idea is not a planet. Does it follow that an idea is an object that orbits a star?
All celestial bodys are object that orbits a stars. An abstract idea is not a celestial body. Therefore, is an abstract idea an object that orbits a star?
An idea is not in the group of planets. Only planets are stated to be object that orbits a stars here. Based on this, is an idea an object that orbits a star?
All planets are object that orbits a stars. An idea is not a planet. The report is due on Friday. Therefore, is an idea an object that orbits a star?
